---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or a workflow improvement
title: '[FR] '
labels: enhancement
---

## The workflow you're trying to support
What you're building or producing, and what's awkward about it today.

## How you handle it today
Tools, manual steps, workarounds.

## What would change if FoamSync supported it natively
Concrete: time saved per job, errors avoided, jobs that become
possible. Operator stories help us decide what to prioritise.

## Optional: a sketch
A rough wireframe, a screenshot with annotations, or a description of
what the UI would feel like.
